g.text: Humidity spike detected. Possible subsurface water venting ahead.
A geyser erupts beneath you! Scalding vapor blasts your suit.
Damage sustained. Check your status, Commander.
Arrived at Crash Site. Food: 86% (-2) | Water: 97% (-3) | Suit: 90% (-10) | Battery: 99% (-3)
Your ship lies crumpled in a shallow crater, venting steam into the thin atmosphere. Debris is scattered across the ice.
Aurren tends to your suit. Suit +10%!
Your companions can stay here or return home.
